author: trumps
text:
Skip parent staging in close when parent is archived

close_and_archive guarded parent.closed_children with a load-or-skip, then unconditionally git-add'd the parent's JSON+notes inside the same call. When the parent was already archived (its file gone from the state worktree), the unstaged git add aborted close with 'pathspec did not match' — leaving the child stuck even though its delivery commit was already on main.

Thread a parent_resaved flag from the load+save block to the staging block: stage parent files only when we actually rewrote them. Tighten the source comment to name the archived-parent case.

Add a regression test that closes a parent first, then closes its child, asserting the child close still archives. Reproduces the exact 'pathspec did not match' failure without the fix.
